chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application No. 870 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No. 27. 2. For order on CMA No. 3875/24. 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For orders on CMA No. 3876/24. 20.11.2025 Mr. Muhammad Ishaq Pirzada, advocate along with Ms. Ammara Durrani, Additional Collector, Appraisement East. Learned counsel states that the reference may be dismissed as withdrawn alongwith listed applications. Order accordingly. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Ayaz p.s.
